title: xyris aquatica
intro: Xyris aquatica, also known as yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial aquatic plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Xyris aquatica include its ability to aid in wound healing and its potential to reduce fever. Xyris aquatica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
